evidence.title: Siasat report on NOTAM OIIX A1010/26, May 23 2026
evidence.source_description: Siasat.com webpage captured via web open; selected relevant page text and metadata from lines 23-34 and 39-65.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates that NOTAM OIIX A1010/26 announced closure of airports across the western Tehran FIR, with limited daylight operations and fresh CAA approval for passenger flights; describes non-weather military/diplomatic context.

evidence.title: Notamify raw text for OIIX A1010/26 and replacement A1015/26
evidence.source_description: Notamify OIIX NOTAM pages retrieved via web open on 2026-06-30. Captured visible page metadata, interpretation, and raw NOTAM text for A1010/26 and replacement A1015/26.
evidence.relevance: Shows the raw NOTAM wording available from a NOTAM aggregator. The text frames the measure as airport-operations closures in the west part of Tehran FIR, lists exceptions operating sunrise-to-sunset, requires new permission for civil IFR passenger flights, and shows A1015/26 replacing A1010/26 with a longer exception list before the deadline.

evidence.title: Iran International report: Iran denies new NOTAM limiting flights across country
evidence.source_description: Iran International webpage retrieved via web open on 2026-06-30; captured article title, timestamp, and relevant lines 39-55.
evidence.relevance: Provides a contrary/source-chain complication: Iran's Civil Aviation Organization spokesperson reportedly denied a new official aviation notice imposing nationwide airspace restrictions and said flights were operating according to schedule, while the same report acknowledges an earlier western-Tehran-FIR airport activity suspension with exemptions.

evidence.title: Indian Express report on Iran western airspace closure, May 23 2026
evidence.source_description: The Indian Express webpage captured via web open; selected relevant page text and metadata from lines 20-61 and 100-115.
evidence.relevance: Reports that Iran's Civil Aviation Authority issued NOTAM OIIX A1010/26 on May 22, valid until May 25, closing all airports in the western Tehran FIR and limiting remaining airports to daylight operations with fresh per-flight CAA approval.
